content.en:
"Ye Tian, when entering the Desolate Realm, there is one thing that must be kept in mind, that is, don't provoke a race, that is the Desolate Demon Clan!"

Divine Blade Supreme reminded.

"Why?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Divine Blade Supreme explained: "The Desolate Demon Clan is the most powerful clan in the Desolate Realm, and it is a clan created by the Desolate Demon Supreme, although this clan is very flawed, but it is very special, all of them can grow to the realm above the Great God level, and have a talent that can mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm, similar to the innate gods to mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm, even a weak Desolate Demon can exert strong combat power, and it is difficult to kill." But they have a very huge flaw, that is, they are slow to reproduce and cannot grow to the realm of cosmic gods. But with their talents, other races can't beat the desolate demon clan at all. If you encounter a desolate demon clan, you must not contend with it, if you encounter a large number of desolate demons, you are not an opponent at all. In the outside world, you don't need to be afraid of the desolate demon clan, but in the desolate world, you can run away when you see them, understand?"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian agreed, but in his heart he was even more curious about the Desolate Demon Clan.

The Desolate Demon Clan has a unique talent that can mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm, but he also has the talent of replication, and he can definitely copy the Desolate Demon's talent, so can't he also mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm?

Of course.

He wouldn't refute the Divine Blade Supreme, after all, the Divine Blade Supreme didn't understand his situation, and he was kind enough to remind him, if he refuted, wouldn't he not give the Divine Blade Supreme face?

Subsequently.

The Divine Blade Supreme chatted with Ye Tian for a while before leaving.

A few days later.

The Blade Battleship sailed to a barren area.

In addition to some racial territories in the universe, there are still many barren areas that do not have the right to clarify the ownership of territories.

For these barren areas, the cosmic clans and even some small clans have little interest.

Because these barren areas, there are no galaxies and stars, only a barren area, with no resources, and it is a waste of manpower to guard them.

So, none of these areas are occupied.

But this barren area gave birth to the wasteland!

Many great clans want to occupy this area, but the Wasteland is not weak, there are many supremes in it, and a single cosmic clan is not an opponent of the Wasteland.

And those innate beings in the Wasteland can not only come out to fight, but also stick to the Wasteland, which is very difficult, unless multiple cosmic clans unite and must pay a huge price to destroy the Wasteland.

But in that case, the cost is not worth the gain.

Therefore, this area is the territory of the Wasteland by default.

"The Wasteland has arrived!"

The Blade battleship stopped.

Ye Tian and some other galaxy-level and galaxy-level powerhouses flew out of the Divine Blade Battleship.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian's eyes were shocked and looked at a huge ball heading there, this ball was very large, exuding a faint light, and that light was full of the power of the world.

"World barrier, this is the wasteland!"

Ye Tian was stunned.

He had always thought that the Wasteland was located in the depths of space, and that the Wasteland could not be seen with the naked eye in the main space of the universe.

But now, he also saw the wasteland.

"It turns out that the wasteland is the main space, not out of the depths of space, it should be that the internal space is in the depths of space, and the outside is in the main space, such a world is too rare!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Distance.

Rumble!!!

Another battleship appeared.

Immediately, a group of angels flew out of the battleship.

Obviously, this is the battleship of the Angel Clan, and these angels are the galaxy-level and galaxy-level powerhouses of the Angel Clan.

From the conversation with the Divine Blade Supreme, Ye Tian naturally knew that this time he was going to enter the list of cosmic clans in the Desolate Realm.

In addition to the human race, there are also some cosmic races such as angels, yakshas, giants, bloods, elves, etc., and the gods and demons are not among them.

It stands to reason that the Protoss and the Demon Race are very powerful and should be qualified to enter the Wasteland, but in fact they are not qualified.

Because, the innate gods hated the gods and demons very much, and in ancient times, the gods and demons tried to occupy the wasteland.

If you fight outside, the innate gods of the wasteland are not the opponents of the gods and demons at all, but inside the wasteland, the innate gods mobilize the power of the wasteland very strongly, and unless the gods or demons fight with all their might, they can destroy the wasteland.

However, the Protoss and the Demon Race were holding each other back, and they could only send a small part of their forces to attack the Wasteland.

It is rumored that in ancient times, there were tens of thousands of innate gods in the wasteland, and in the battle with the gods and demons, thousands of the innate gods in the wasteland were killed.

After that, the races of the universe rose, and the gods and demons had no energy to deal with the wasteland.

And the wasteland was attacked by the gods and demons, and the losses were extremely heavy, and naturally the people who hated the gods and demons were extremely hateful, and they would never allow the gods and demons to enter the wasteland.

At the beginning, the major cosmic clans signed an agreement with the innate gods of the desolate realm, and it did not include the gods and demons.

Therefore, the Protoss and the Demon Race did not send anyone this time!

After a few more days, more than a dozen cosmic clans sent a large number of galaxy-level and galaxy-level to come over.

"Let's get started!"

More than a dozen supremes of the cosmic clan met and said.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian felt the power of the Divine Blade Supreme enveloping him.

Then, in a flash, these galaxy-level and galaxy-level were forcibly thrown into the Wasteland by the Supremes, turning into streamers scattered all over the Wasteland.

......

Wasteland, Origin Void.

This is a void that only the innate gods of the wasteland can enter.

At this time, in the Origin Void, the divine consciousness of one innate god after another was communicating.

"The cosmic clans outside have sent some little guys to our desolate family, probably because they want the resources of our desolate world. Hmph, although our wasteland resources are abundant, they are not unlimited, these guys are too greedy. "

"There's no way, there are too many cosmic clans in the outside world, and we can still compete with a single cosmic clan, but if these cosmic clans are united, we are not opponents, we can only stick to the wasteland. But if we sign an agreement, we can also go to the outside world, and even cultivate the geniuses of the wasteland, and send some geniuses to places of chance with all parts of the universe. If the Wasteland is blocked by the Universe Clan, our life will not be easy. It's like swapping resources!"

"However, we can't let these little guys of the foreign race have a good time, and they will be ordered to go down and kill the people of the foreign race when they see them!"

Then, one by one, the instructions were conveyed to the tribes of the wasteland.

Suddenly, all the races in the wasteland knew that a foreign race had descended.

A riot is coming!
